CustomField.description: If an external booking is made with no payment, it will remain in progress for this number of hours, at which time it will go cold and inventory will be released unless a payment is made and the opportunity becomes booked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If an external booking is made with no payment, it will remain in progress for this number of hours, at which time it will go cold and inventory will be released unless a payment is made and the opportunity becomes booked.
CustomField.label: Ext Booking No Payment Expiry Hours
